channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Opposite 67 Mosslea rd, 22nd April
item.description:
Been there for months. It’s opposite 67 Mosslea rd .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street sign difficult to read, 22nd April
item.description:
The sign at the entrance to the south driveway at King William IV Gardens is faded and difficult to read. Could it please be replaced?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): King William IV Gardens, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shattered Blue Glass over the payment leading to the train station, 22nd April
item.description:
As above.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Approach, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Smashed Glass underneath the Bus Stop Seat, 22nd April
item.description:
As above.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourne Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Roadwork barriers strewn across pavement, 22nd April
item.description:
Roadwork barriers have been dumped in a dangerous position blocking the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Lime Street, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Skoda oppositenos 1&2 Lulworth Road, 22nd April
item.description:
This skoda has been abandoned outside numbers 1 & 2 Lulworth Road now for weeks. No one living on Lulworth Road owns it. Photo attached. Please arrange to remove the vehicle.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lulworth Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The wheels on the bins are broken and need replacing, 22nd April
item.description:
The wheels on the bins are broken and need replacing because the council wont collect them as they cant move the bins with broken wheels
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Darsley Drive, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead tree bough could cause injury, 22nd April
item.description:
There is a dead tree bough high up on a tree outside No,23 Crantock Road. We are concerned that if dead it may rot and fall on a pedestrian causing sever injury.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crantock Road, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bags dumped usual place cossall park, 22nd April
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wood's Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Our residential road is now heavily congested due to traffic diversions, 22nd April
item.description:
Constant queues, increased noise, air pollution. Drivers are often aggressive, making U-turns on Graham Rd, causing accidents and near misses. I no longer feel it is safe to cross the road with young children and it's affecting residents' quality of life.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwood Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins permanetly left on the pavement, 22nd April
item.description:
84 Flaxton Road - Bins are permanently left on the pavement often overflowing.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Flaxton Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left on peninsula, 22nd April
item.description:
On the end of the peninsula a large amount of rubbish has been left. Some will be harmful to the birds .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Goddington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish in road and on pavement, 22nd April
item.description:
Approx 5 bags of what looks like builders waste in the road outside No 13 Navarino Road - and general rubbish on the pavement outside no 20 Navarino Road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Navarino Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 27 Greenland road, 22nd April
item.description:
Thames water cover is leaking straight into street drain

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Greenland Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glengall Road, 22nd April
item.description:
Pavement needs sweeping between kilburn highroad and charteris road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glengall Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip on grassed area, 22nd April
item.description:
Dumpped rubbish on grass verge next to pathway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croydon Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside the bread peddler, 22nd April
item.description:
The small tree outside the bread pedller appearsto have died and needs replacing please
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Erskine Road, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish on pavement in access road to Beeches Close, 22nd April
item.description:
Bags of rubbish and loose items have been dumped on the pavement against wall

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Beeches Close, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A black male early 20s ON 22/04/26 at 9:30am were seen dumping 30 black large bags of building material and waste inside Osborne road E9 5JR garage near a parking bay. I reported it to the metropolitan police. White ford transit custom van. Registration: BC66 EYS. Sometimes I wonder why I even report this because Hackney Council do nothing. This is why so many people fly tipping. I will leave this information in your hands., 22nd April
item.description:
A black male early 20s ON 22/04/26 at 9:30am were seen dumping 30 black large bags of building material and waste inside Osborne road E9 5JR garage near a parking bay. I reported it to the metropolitan police. White ford transit custom van. BC66 EYS

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Reading Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Building material fly tipped, 22nd April
item.description:
Building material.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Osborne Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
